Combined printed-name-and-capacity widget. Matches Shape D of filing-signer-shape (used by 31 MRSA / LLC-LP forms — capacity rather than title). The §1676.1.D constraint is that the signer is the person denying; the capacity here typically reads 'Authorized Person' or names the position the denied authority attached to.
